Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10054 0 0}*cough* *cough* Too much singing. My throat's killin' me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}We won't be able to hang out like this for much longer. My school life's coming to an end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10064 0 0}You know, I haven't really taken much seriously before, but... now that I'm getting married...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 10 25 25}Do you think I can make her happy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, plenty of couples are happy with their marriages, right? We just gotta be one of them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Huh... This might actually be the last time we...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10086 0 0}Uh, alright! Let's do something else! How 'bout the arcade?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After hanging out with Tomochika for[n]a while, I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
